---
title: "Keywords for Scientists"
author: "Lasse Hjorth Madsen"
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  cache: false
---

```{r set_up}
library(tidyverse)
library(quanteda)
library(quanteda.textstats)

prof <- readRDS("../../blueskynet/dev/net/profiles_2024-01-28.rds") |> 
  as_tibble()
```

```{r}
corp <- corpus(prof$description)

toks <- tokens(corp, remove_punct = TRUE) |> 
  tokens_remove(pattern = c(stopwords("en"), "|", "+"))

dfm <- dfm(toks)
freq <- dfm |> textstat_frequency(n = 100)

bigrams <- tokens_ngrams(toks, n = 2, concatenator = " ")
bi_dfm <- dfm(bigrams)
bi_freq <- bi_dfm |> textstat_frequency(n = 100)
```

```{r}
#| fig-height: 15
freq %>% 
  ggplot(aes(y = reorder(feature, frequency), x = frequency)) +
  geom_point() +
  labs(x = "Frequency (log)", y = NULL) +
  scale_x_log10() +
  theme_minimal()
```

```{r}
#| fig-height: 15
bi_freq %>% 
  ggplot(aes(y = reorder(feature, frequency), x = frequency)) +
  geom_point() +
  labs(x = "Frequency (log)", y = NULL) +
  scale_x_log10() +
  theme_minimal()

```

```{r save}
c(freq$feature, bi_freq$feature) |> 
  write_lines("../data/description_freqs.txt")
```
